cash_action.why: Market DOWN hai — capital surakshit rakho, ETF nahi. ~6% milega, kabhi bhi nikal sakte ho.
cash_action.note: Jab Nifty 200-DMA paar kare, tab NIFTYBEES mein shift karna.

commentary: Market downtrend mein hai — Nifty (23,623) apne 200-DMA (24,907) se 5.2% neeche. System ne sahi cash bachaya hai; momentum systems mein bear market ka matlab nuksaan se bachna hai. Jab tak Nifty 200-DMA paar nahi karta, koi naya buy nahi aayega — cash bhi ek position hai.
